title: Crafting Ores and Creative Items
description: You can craft ores like diamond and some creative only items and blocks like bedrock and barriers.
body:
**This mod makes ores like diamonds and creative-only items craftable!**

**This means you can craft barriers to fool your friend or make a bedrock prison for them.**

You can also craft things for yourself like a diamond nugget crafted from stone and blue wool. Then put 9 nuggets for the real diamond. If you will make a bedrock prison, beware since there is a bedrock pickaxe which mines anything when right clicked on the block (right clicking on barrier, bedrock or end portal frame gives the item). This mod can make it easier to get full diamond armour and tools easily. All the ores will be craftable in future updates.

This mod is made by the youtuber Vision - [https://www.youtube.com/@Vision_Minecraft/featured](https://www.youtube.com/@Vision_Minecraft/featured)
